full_text:
Jin Yi (Deyi) 金祎 (德禕)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jin Yi (金祎), styledDeyi (德禕), was born in Jingzhao. Descendant of Jin Midi. Advised Geng Ji on killing Wang Bi. Died fighting in the coup. Jin Yi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Han Dynasty. Jin Yi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
